key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision (meeting day 2, announcement)
key_events_next_24h.note: Rate hold 3.50-3.75% near-certain. Hawkish Powell tone = bearish risk; dovish pivot signal = bullish.

key_events_next_24h.name: Fed Chair Powell Press Conference
key_events_next_24h.note: Market watching for any hint of future cuts. Forward guidance tone is the key catalyst for BTC direction.

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report (US market open)
key_events_next_24h.note: 9 consecutive days of positive inflows. Ongoing institutional accumulation supports BTC floor.

key_events_next_24h.name: SEC NYSE Arca Crypto ETF Listing Rule Change (published Apr 27)
key_events_next_24h.note: Proposed rule could shorten crypto ETF approval timelines from 240 to 75 days. Structurally bullish.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran Peace Talks / Hormuz Watch
key_events_next_24h.note: Iran sent new proposal to Washington; naval blockade ongoing, Hormuz still partially restricted. No resolution imminent.

notes: FOMC 결정 대기(4/29), ETF 9일 연속 유입, BTC $77K 횡보 중립

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,200 as of Apr 28 21:00 UTC (range $76,870-$77,875 across sources Apr 28). $80K resistance unbroken — heavy sell wall capping the rally. Support ~$75,000 (100-day MA). BTC +14% in April 2026.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 47 (Neutral) — recovered from 33 (Fear) yesterday and 29 last week
BTC up ~14% in April 2026 (best April performance in years)
9 consecutive days of positive BTC spot ETF inflows
Strategy (MicroStrategy) bought $2.54B BTC (34,164 BTC) — largest buy since 2024
Goldman Sachs filed SEC registration for Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (Apr 15)
KelpDAO exploit: $292M stolen, $14B DeFi TVL exodus — altcoins hit harder than BTC
Trump proposal to expand US government BTC holdings — bullish long-term structural signal
FOMC Apr 28-29 meeting: rate hold 3.50-3.75% near-certain; Powell tone is key risk event
Iran peace proposal sent to Washington; Hormuz partially restricted, no resolution imminent
No CPI/PPI releases in next 24h (CPI Apr release: May 12; PPI Apr release: May 13)
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC Day 1 Apr 28, decision Apr 29 at 18:00 UTC. Rate hold near-certain but market awaits Powell press conference for forward guidance tone. ETF inflows remain strong (9 consecutive days). BTC holding $77K support but $80K resistance intact. F&G recovered to Neutral (47), up sharply from 33 yesterday. Confidence at 0.50 — macro filter ACTIVE (requires >= 0.50).
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.50): Monthly gain (+14%) and sustained ETF inflows are bullish structural signals. However, FOMC decision tomorrow creates pre-event volatility uncertainty. BTC slipped 1.6% on Apr 27 despite positive daily market cap. $80K resistance unbroken. KelpDAO DeFi exploit adds risk-off undertone for altcoins. Mixed signals justify neutral regime; confidence at 0.50 threshold based on F&G recovery and continued ETF demand.
